passing_score_scale: 75 on scale of 1–99; state requirements vary
exam_price_notes: Fees and requirements vary by state licensing board.

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing (CBT) at Pearson VUE test centers

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name must match ARRT registration exactly. Secondary ID may be requested.
exam_rules: Closed-book computer-based test. On-screen calculator provided. No personal items permitted in testing room. Score scale 1–99; passing score is 75. Ethics review (pre-application review) required before testing.
renewal_options: Biennial (2-year) renewal required. 24 continuing education (CE) credits required per 2-year renewal cycle. CE must be in radiologic sciences or related field. Initial certification valid for 3 years from exam pass date.

prerequisites.description: State-specific limited X-ray machine operator (LXMO) requirements; may require ARRT limited scope exam

retake_policy.notes: Maximum 3 attempts to pass an ARRT exam. After 3 failures, candidate must petition the ARRT board for additional attempts. Full exam fee required for each attempt.

official_study_resources.title: ARRT Exam Content Specifications
official_study_resources.notes: Free downloadable content specifications per credential; lists content categories and subcategories
